name: codex-review-pipeline
description: 3-stage code review pipeline (correctness + impact analysis + adversarial) via Codex — auto-fix loop until PASS

maxIterations.title: Max Iterations
maxIterations.description: Max auto-fix iterations per review stage before escalating to user

failOnError.title: Fail On Error
failOnError.description: If true, abort pipeline on first stage that can't PASS within maxIterations instead of escalating
